creator: mph@astro.caltech.edu
text:
On Wed, Jun 23, 1999 at 08:00:29PM -0400, Brandon Fosdick wrote:

> 18c18
> < PREFIX=		${LOCALBASE}/pilot
> ---
> > PREFIX=		${LOCALBASE}

I'm not convinced that this is a bug.  The palm/prc-tools port installs
to ${LOCALBASE}/pilot as well, so that all of its gcc crap isn't mixed in
with everything else.  I suspect pilot-link puts its files in the same
hierarchy deliberately.  You're supposed to add /usr/local/palm/bin to
your PATH.

-- 
Matthew Hunt <mph@astro.caltech.edu> * UNIX is a lever for the
http://www.pobox.com/~mph/           * intellect. -J.R. Mashey
